{{Infobox concept
| name = Blue (Cradle)
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Blue is a character who displays high levels of confidence and enthusiasm. She has been observed performing helpful tasks, such as retrieving large containers filled with purple orbs and assisting others through physical gestures like saluting or cheering. She is capable of intense focus when performing specific actions and has shown an interest in acquiring significant power.}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|As a spirit composed of [[pure madra]], the [[Herald]] known as [[Little Blue]] serves as a significant source of concern for [[Yerin]]. Despite this tension, the entity possesses immense power capable of matching [[Orthos]] in strength. Furthermore, Blue maintains the ability to recover through the way of [[Heralds]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Blue is a source of concern for [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Blue is a character capable of matching [[Orthos]] in strength.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17">''Waybound'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Blue can recover in the way of [[Heralds]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Blue is referred to as [[Little Blue]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Blue is a [[Herald]] and a spirit of [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
